# PERF-192 positive: make(map) without size hint before population
lang: go
file: PERF-192-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "fmt"

func Index(names []string) map[string]int {
	idx := make(map[string]int)
	for _, n := range names {
		idx[n] = len(n)
	}
	return idx
}

func _() {
	fmt.Println(Index([]string{"a", "b"}))
}
